name: Indonesian Curry Spice Paste
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dried, toasted, flaked, unsweetened coconut
12 Dried cayenne chiles, stems and seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
Info: from December 1992 "Chile Pepper Spicy World Cuisine" magazine posted by Perry Lowell, Mar. '93
This paste can be used as a marinade or rub for any meat, poultry, or fish, or as a base for a sauce.
Place the coconut into a food processor and blend until the consistency of a paste.
Saute the onion and garlic in 2 tablespoons of peanut oil. Remove and add to the coconut.
Add all the remaining ingredients to the coconut mixture and process, while slowly adding enough oil to form a paste.
Heat Scale: Medium to Hot
